sqlCommands.descr: update TransX set Txt = '4-IFRS' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt in ('','UNKNOWN')
Update TransX set Amt1 =Amt2 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[yyyy-mm-dd]' = '2022-01-31' and not Co like '599%' and Flex9 is NULL
update TransX set Txt = 'G26-Misc' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt = 'G26'
update TransX set Flex4 = (case when Co < '5990' then '01 ' else '02 ' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = ''
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LIC Assumed D15' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '22%' or GL like '282%' or GL in ('2550001','2550002','2853500'))
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LIC Assumed' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('155','215') and GL like '%01'
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + ' to IFRS9' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt = 'G23-Rev' and GL in ('2822000','2822500','2853500')
update TransX set Flex4 = '02 Other clear' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt = 'G26-Misc' and GL in ('2853500')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Division, Region, Amt1, Amt2, Amt4, Amt6, Flex6) (select KeyID, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Division, Region, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt6,0)),2) as Amt6, 'pass1' as Flex6  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Period, Ledger, Co, GL, TP, Division, Region)
update TransX set Amt3 = Amt1 - Amt2, Amt5 = Amt1 - Amt4, Amt7 = Amt1 - Amt6 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex6 is null or (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt4 = 0 and Amt6 = 0))
update TransX set Flex1 = Mapkey from TransX t inner join mapkeyranges m on t.GL >= m.fromGL and t.GL <=m.thruGL where keyID = '[batchID]' and mapkey like 'M1-1-10-__'
update TransX set Flex2 = m.Name from TransX t inner join mapkeys m on t.flex1 = m.mapkey where keyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is null
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = m.Name from TransX t inner join TPs m on t.TP = m.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data2', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '1. [CQ1] vs. [PQ1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt3)/1000,0) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)
update TransX set Txt = 'G23' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt = '' and Co like '599%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2,Flex4) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, '99. no QIS mapping for OS GL' as Flex2,Flex4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, FSitem, Flex1,Flex4)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data2', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '2. [CQ1] vs. [PYE1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt5)/1000,0) as Amt5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' and Period > 3 group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)

Update TransX set Co = 'JE', GL = Flex9, Flex4 = Flex6, Flex5 = '', TTY = '', TP = '', BusCat = '', BusCatDesc = 'JE',CC = '', PC = '', Txt = (case when Flex9 = 'IFRS-17' then 'Topside JE17' else '4-IFRS' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex9 is NULL
Update TransX set CC = substring(CC,4,1) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC <> ''
Update TransX set CC = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,1) in ('1','2','3')
update TransX set  BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update t set Flex5 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Fsitem = m.ID and m.Table_ID = 'M17 QIS' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Txt = 'G23-Rev' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt = 'G23'
update TransX set Txt = 'G24-FFH TP' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt = 'G24'
update TransX set Txt = 'G25-ODY TP' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt = 'G25'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data2', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '3. [CQ1] vs. [PYCQ1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt7)/1000,0) as Amt7 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'UG' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Abs(Amt1) < 500

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data3', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '1. [CQ1] vs. [PQ1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt3)/1000,0) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
Update TransX set PC = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not PC in ('4020100070','4020200070','5702999000')
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LRC Ceded 28100xx' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('2810029','2810033','2810034','2810037','2810038') and Flex4 in ('01 ','02 ')
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LRC Ceded' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('156','216') and GL like '%00'
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'Other' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 in ('01 ','02 ')
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + ' (Alex ADJ RI)' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 like '02 %' and Txt = 'RI'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, 'Topside JE17' as Txt, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, '02 LIC Assumed D15 clear to IFRS9' as Flex4, Flex5 from (select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5 from TransX where  KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('2550001','2550002') and FSitem = '2000') a )

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5) (Select KeyID, '5990' as Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, '' as PC, 'G23-Rev' as Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, replace(replace(Flex4,'01 ','02 '),'(Alex Start)','clear') as Flex4, Flex5 from (select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5 from TransX where  KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4020100070' and GL in ('1480000','2820000') and not Flex4 like '%clear') a )

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5) (Select KeyID, '5990' as Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, '' as PC, 'G23-Rev' as Txt, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, replace(replace(Flex4,'01 ','02 '),'(Alex Start)','clear (Alex ADJ)') as Flex4, Flex5 from (select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5 from TransX where  KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4020100070' and GL in ('1480000','2820000') and not Flex4 like '% clear') a )

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5) (Select KeyID, '5990' as Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, '' as PC, 'G23-Rev' as Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, '02 ' + substring(Flex4,4,99) + ' clear (Alex ADJ)' as Flex4, Flex5 from (select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5 from TransX where  KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4020200070' and not GL in ('1480000','2820000')) a )

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5) (Select KeyID, '5990' as Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, '' as PC, 'G23-Rev' as Txt, -Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, '02 ' + substring(Flex4,4,99) + ' clear' as Flex4, Flex5 from (select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5 from TransX where  KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4020200070' and not GL in ('1480000','2820000')) a )

update t set FSitem = OS_GL, Flex1 = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru and t.TTY = c.TTY and t.BusCat = c.BC_From and (t.TP = c.TP_From or (len(t.TP) = 4 and c.TP_From = 'O') or (t.TP like 'F%' and c.TP_From = 'F')) where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update t set FSitem = OS_GL, Flex1 = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru and t.TTY = c.TTY and c.BC_From = '' and (t.TP = c.TP_From or (len(t.TP) = 4 and c.TP_From = 'O') or (t.TP like 'F%' and c.TP_From = 'F')) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and FSitem is NULL

update t set FSitem = OS_GL, Flex1 = OS_GL_Desc from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 c on t.GL >= c.GL_From and t.GL <= c.GL_Thru and t.Co >= c.Co_From and t.Co <= c.Co_Thru and t.TTY like c.TTY and c.BC_From = '' and (t.TP = c.TP_From or (len(t.TP) = 4 and c.TP_From = 'O') or (t.TP like 'F%' and c.TP_From = 'F')) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and FSitem is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1,Flex4) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, '4-JE-Rev' as Txt, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, FSitem, Flex1,(case when Flex4 = '' then '' else replace(Flex4,'01 ','02 ') + ' clear' end) as Flex4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = 'JE' and Txt = '4-IFRS')
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LRC Assumed E47' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('211','219')
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LRC Assumed E49' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '2855100'
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LRC Assumed E50' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '18%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data3', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '2. [CQ1] vs. [PYE1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt5)/1000,0) as Amt5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' and Period > 3 group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data3', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '3. [CQ1] vs. [PYCQ1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt7)/1000,0) as Amt7 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'IF' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Abs(Amt1) < 500

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data4', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '1. [CQ1] vs. [PQ1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt3)/1000,0) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data4', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '2. [CQ1] vs. [PYE1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt5)/1000,0) as Amt5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' and Period > 3 group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1) (select KeyID + '-data4', Ledger, Flex1, Flex2, '3. [CQ1] vs. [PYCQ1]' as Flex3, round(sum(Amt7)/1000,0) as Amt7 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Ledger = 'US' group by KeyID, Ledger, Flex1, Flex2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Abs(Amt1) < 500
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update t set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update t set Flex2 = m.Descr, Flex3 = m.Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Fsitem = m.ID and m.Table_ID = 'M17 FS' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LRC Ceded H49' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('23','24') or GL like '287%' or (GL = '2810029' and TP like 'F%'))
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LRC Assumed E55' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '13%'

update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + ' (Alex Start)' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 like '01 %' and TP = '' and not Co in ('2999','3999') and not PC in ('4020200070','5702999000') and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('18','20','21','23') or substring(GL,1,3) in ('131','141','142','143','144','145','151','159','283','284','287') or (substring(GL,1,3) in ('148','282') and PC = '4020100070'))

update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + ' (Alex ADJ)' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 like '02 % clear%' and TP = '' and not Co in ('2999','3999') and not PC in ('4020200070','5702999000') and (substring(GL,1,2) in ('18','20','21','23') or substring(GL,1,3) in ('131','141','142','143','144','145','151','159','283','284','287') or (substring(GL,1,3) in ('148','282') and PC = '4020100070'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, 'Topside JE17' as Txt, Amt1, '2052' as FSitem, ' Other taxes payable (including sales tax, VAT, capital and payroll tax) ' as Flex1, '01. Accounts Payable and Accrued Liabilities' as Flex2, Flex3, '02 Other clear' as Flex4, '29. Accounts Payable and Accrued Liabilities' as Flex5 from (select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5 from TransX where  KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('2550001','2550002')) a )

update t set Flex2 = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Flex3 = m.Field1 and m.Table_ID = 'M17 FS' and m.Descr like (case when t.Flex3 = '3-Equity' then '%Retained Earnings%' else '%Accounts Payable%' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = 'fill'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, CC, PC, Txt, Amt1, FSitem, Flex1, Flex5, Flex3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, 'fill' as Co, 'fill' as GL, '' as TTY, '' as TP, '' as BusCat, '' as CC, '' as PC, '4-IFRS' as Txt, 0 as Amt1, 'fill' as FSitem, 'fill' as Flex1, Descr as Flex5, Field1 as Flex3 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'M17 QIS' and not Descr in (select distinct Flex5 from TransX where  KeyID = '[batchID]'))
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LIC Assumed E49' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('283','284')
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LIC Ceded G13' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,2) = '14' or (substring(GL,1,3) in ('156','216') and GL like '%01'))
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LRC Ceded H47' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('151','159')
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + ' clear' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 like '02 %' and not Txt = 'RI' and not substring(GL,1,3) in ('155','156','157','215','216','217') and not Co = 'JE'
update TransX set Flex4 = '02 LRC Ceded 28100xx Source' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = '01 LRC Ceded 28100xx'
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LIC Assumed D13' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '20%'
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LRC Assumed' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('155','215') and GL like '%00'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2,Flex3,Flex4,Flex5,Flex6) (Select '[batchID]',CCgrp,Name,Parent,SortSeq,CreatedBy,convert(varchar,CreatedOn,101) as CreatedOn from CCgrps)
update TransX set Flex5 = substring(Flex5,11,99) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(Flex5,1,10) = 'ODYSSEYRE\'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt4 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt6 = 0
update TransX set TP = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not (GL like '19999%' or GL like '19989%')
update TransX set Division = p.Division,  Region = p.Region, Location = p.Location, Zone = p.Zone from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Zone = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division in ('US_INS_OPS','LATAMER','FIRV','CORPORATE') and not Zone is NULL
update TransX set Region = Location, Zone = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division in ('EUROASIA','AMERICAS') and not Zone is NULL
update TransX set Division = Region, Region = Location, Zone = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division in ('LONDON_MKT') and not Zone is NULL
update TransX set Region = Division, Division = 'Other',  Zone = NULL where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Zone is NULL
update TransX set  BusCat = '20' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'
update TransX set Region = 'AMER_MISC' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division = 'AMERICAS' and Region = ''
update TransX set Flex4 = Flex4 + 'LRC Assumed E59' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '16%'
update TransX set  BusCat = '30' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
